title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
posterAlt: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After barely surviving a brutal attack by a sadistic serial killer, crime boss Jang Dong-su is left humiliated. Determined to catch the killer known as K, he forms an uneasy alliance with Jung Tae-seok, a relentless and incorruptible detective who often disrupts his illegal business. However, while Jang Dong-su wants K dead, Jung Tae-suk is determined to bring him to justice. With a deal in place—whoever finds K first will decide his fate—the hunt begins, blurring the lines between crime and law.
synopsis: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil is a 2019 action, crime and thriller film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 16 certification (BR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
